identificationModule.officialTitle: A Phase I, Single-Center, Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Clinical Study to Evaluate the Effect of Single-Dose Hydronidone Capsules on QTc Interval in Chinese Healthy Subjects

primaryOutcomes.measure: The relationship between plasma drug concentration and placebo-corrected change from baseline in QTc interval (ΔΔQTc) following single-dose administration of Hydroxynidone Capsules
